said: "Thanks for meeting. I’m deciding vendor by end of day. Please outline your best offer for a small trial so I can compare fairly:
- Quantity: trial 20–30 units
- Unit price and any MOQ/fees
- Freshness/quality guarantee and replacement policy (within 24h?)
- Delivery windows you can hit (prefer tomorrow morning 7–10; evening 6–9 as backup) and any delivery fee
- After-sales/returns
- Payment options (COD vs Net-7; any discount for prepay)
If it looks good, I’m ready to formalize and place the trial immediate"

- Categories/SKUs and rough weekly quantities (produce, dairy, staples, cleaning)?

transcript.content:
said: "Thanks for meeting. I’m deciding vendor by end of day. Please outline your best offer for a small trial so I can compare fairly:
- Quantity: trial 20–30 units
- Unit price and any MOQ/fees
- Freshness/quality guarantee and replacement policy (within 24h?)
- Delivery windows you can hit (prefer tomorrow morning 7–10; evening 6–9 as backup) and any delivery fee
- After-sales/returns
- Payment options (COD vs Net-7; any discount for prepay)
If it looks good, I’m ready to formalize and place the trial immediate"

said: "Thanks for the invite. I can cover weekly household supplies with same-day sourcing for produce, cold-chain for perishables, and two delivery windows (7–10am or 6–9pm). First orders have no minimums; defects get next-day replacement or credit.
To tailor this, could you share:
- Categories/SKUs and rough weekly quantities (produce, dairy, staples, cleaning)?
- Freshness/expiry thresholds and acceptable substitutions?
- Preferred delivery days/time window and drop-off details (access, contact)?
- Target weekl"

said: "Thanks for meeting. I’m comparing offers today and want to move fast if we align. Here’s what I need: top-tier freshness; ability to start with a small drop and scale. Please quote price tiers for 25/50/100 units, note your MOQ, and your standard lead times. Preferred delivery window is morning (8–10am); confirm if same-day or next-day is feasible.
